title: Portuguese Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make pilaf dish from Portugal, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe combines the simplicity of rice with the savory taste of portuguese seasonings.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the pilaf and cook until lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the rice and stir to coat with the oil and mix with the pilaf.
Add the water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the water is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff the rice with a fork and serve hot.
Sprinkle with xerisque and serve immediately.
